capabilities: Ensure seamless integration of secret management and agent planning by aligning workflows and maintaining rigorous validation and logging.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from secret management and agent planning by using domain-specific tools to ensure compatibility; verify that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code to an audit trail after each merge operation to maintain a comprehensive record of integration activities using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the merged output using domain-specific validation tools; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true to confirm successful integration.
Filter candidates for workflow alignment using domain-specific tools; verify that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true to ensure accurate detection.
Assign results using domain-specific classification tools; confirm that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true to maintain consistency in classification.

summary: Integrate secret management with agent planning knowledge bases by merging workflows and ensuring consistent validation and logging practices.
title: Secret Management

failureConditions: Inconsistent integration when workflows are not properly aligned, causing errors in secret management operations.
Data loss when logging is incomplete, leading to gaps in audit trails and potential security breaches.
Validation failures when domain-specific tools are not used, causing incorrect results in merged outputs.
metrics: the merged output using domain-specific validation tools
